{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,

  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Unblocked soffits allow fire and smoke to spread undetected through concealed spaces.",
    "Missing fireblocking at soffit intersections violates IRC R302.11."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved fireblocking material (e.g., 2x lumber, gypsum board, mineral wool) at all soffit-to-wall intersections and at 10-foot intervals in concealed soffit spaces.",
    "Inspect all other concealed draftstop and fireblock locations before closing up."
  ],
  "rationale": "IRC R302.11 requires fireblocking in concealed spaces, including soffits, to cut off vertical and horizontal flame spread. Unblocked soffits are a direct code violation and present a high fire risk during the rough-complete stage.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R302.11"
  ]
}
